capitalContribution.valueRequired: Enter the total value of all monetary and non-monetary contributions
capitalContribution.twoDecimalPlaces: Value must be a number with 2 decimal places
capitalContribution.noSymbols: Value must not include currency symbols like £, $ and €
capitalContribution.noComma: Value must not include a comma
capitalContribution.atLeastOneType: Select at least one type of contribution
capitalContribution.currencyRequired: Select the currency of the capital contribution

confirm.countryMissing: We cannot identify the country for this address. Select Change, then select the country.

address.premisesMissing: Enter a property name or number
address.premisesLength: Property name or number must be 200 characters or less
address.premisesInvalid: Property name or number must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.addressLine1Missing: Enter address line 1, typically the building and street
address.addressLine1Invalid: Address line 1 must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.addressLine1Length: Address line 1 must be 50 characters or less
address.addressLine2Invalid: Address line 2 must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.addressLine2Length: Address line 2 must be 50 characters or less
address.localityInvalid: Town or city must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.localityLength: Town or city must be 50 characters or less
address.regionInvalid: County must only include letters a to z, numbers and common special characters such as hyphens, spaces and apostrophes
address.regionLength: County must be 50 characters or less
address.postcodeInvalid: Postcode must only include letters a to z, numbers and spaces
address.postalCodeLength: Postcode must be 20 characters or less
address.jurisdictionCountry: You must enter a country that matches your jurisdiction
address.jurisdictionEnglandAndWales: You must enter a postcode which is in England or Wales
address.jurisdictionNorthernIreland: You must enter a postcode which is in Northern Ireland
address.jurisdictionScotland: You must enter a postcode which is in Scotland

dateOfUpdate.registeredOfficeAddress: Date the registered office address changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.principalPlaceOfBusinessAddress: Date the principal place of business changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.partnershipName: Date the partnership name changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.term: Date the term changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.generalPartner: Date the general partner changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
dateOfUpdate.limitedPartner: Date the limited partner changed must be the same as or after limited partnership's registration date
